description: Bidirectional GitHub Issues sync — create, update, and resolve GitHub issues from AoA tasks

capabilityDescriptions.issues.read: Read AoA issues to detect status changes for sync
capabilityDescriptions.issues.update: Update AoA issue status when a linked GitHub issue changes
capabilityDescriptions.issue.comments.read: Read AoA issue comments for bridging to GitHub
capabilityDescriptions.issue.comments.create: Post bridged GitHub comments to AoA issues
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.write: Store and update issue link mappings
capabilityDescriptions.events.subscribe: Listen for issue.updated and issue.comment_added events
capabilityDescriptions.secrets.read-ref: Resolve your GitHub personal access token from the secrets store
capabilityDescriptions.webhooks.receive: Receive issue and comment events from GitHub webhooks
capabilityDescriptions.agent.tools.register: Expose search, link, and unlink tools to AoA agents
capabilityDescriptions.instance.settings.register: Register the GitHub Issues configuration page
capabilityDescriptions.ui.detailTab.register: Show the GitHub Issues detail tab on AoA issue pages
